smg.text: Very hot. Fine apart from cloudy periods. One or two showers. Force 3 to 4 south to southwesterly winds.
Very hot. Cloudy apart from sunny periods. A few showers later. Force 3 to 4 south to southwesterly winds.
Mainly cloudy. A few showers. Possible thunderstorms. Force 2 to 4 south to southwesterly winds.
Mainly cloudy. A few showers. Possible thunderstorms at first. Force 2 to 4 southerly winds.
Mainly cloudy. A few showers. Force 2 to 4 southerly winds.
Cloudy apart from sunny intervals. One or two showers. Force 3 to 4 southerly winds.
Cloudy apart from sunny intervals. One or two showers. Force 3 to 4 southerly winds.
